subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Hearken unto My call from the direction of My prison. Verily, there is none other God but Me, the All-Merciful, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی اسمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه لا اله الا انا المشفق الکریم انک
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
